evals.name: aria-snapshot-flow
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Design the first Stagehand flow to verify a dialog opens and exposes the right ARIA structure.
evals.expected_output: Selects aria-snapshot-flow and uses ARIA snapshot language.

evals.name: layout-tree-assertion
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Recommend the first layout-tree assertion for a flex toolbar spacing regression.
evals.expected_output: Selects layout-tree-assertion and mentions DOMSnapshot or layout tree.

evals.name: screenshot-migration
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Replace a screenshot-only check for a settings panel with a better Stagehand assertion strategy.
evals.expected_output: Selects screenshot-migration and reduces screenshot reliance.

evals.name: install-check
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Validate whether Stagehand and Playwright are installed correctly before writing tests.
evals.expected_output: Selects install-check and mentions the install script.

evals.name: assertion-layer
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Decide whether a browser test should use ARIA snapshots, layout-tree assertions, or screenshots for a menu alignment issue.
evals.expected_output: Selects assertion-layer and chooses layout-friendly proof.
